question.label: Stretch gap
question.name: You said 'not much stretching me right now' — what kind of work would feel stretching in a good way?
question.description: Drills into the low-stretch thread she just named to surface what challenge is missing.

answer: Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.

assessment.note: She doesn't name a motivating stretch and instead points to review context-switching that is wearing but tolerable, which is a mild negative engagement signal.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Recognition gap
new_queue.name: What felt missing in how the refactor was recognised?

new_queue.label: Mentoring trade-off
new_queue.name: What would you need to drop to make space for mentoring?

new_queue.label: Next-step close
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
